    "Window pan flashing is completely absent at rough-complete stage."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove window units as necessary to install compliant sill pan flashing integrated with the WRB before proceeding with exterior cladding or interior finishes."
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of window pan flashing violates IRC R703.4 (or IBC equivalent for commercial projects) and manufacturer installation instructions, which require a continuous pan flashing to drain water to the exterior. This poses a high risk of water intrusion and structural damage.",
